race.description: Black Gwm - Hope Cup Benchmark 62 Hcp
race.comment: SEAMS LOGICAL (2) is backing up quickly on home turf after finishing in the money over 1100m just seven days ago. Good effort last start and is a definite winning chance. CHARMED PASSAGE (5) has put together back-to-back placings, the latest when a nose away in second over 1100m at Gatton when he was prominent throughout. Nicely placed to play a pivotal role. BULSARA (1) took advantage of the good draw and sat on the pace last start before tiring to finish fifth, beaten 5 lengths, over 1000m at Sunshine Coast Poly. Can figure in the finish. WANTED HILLBILLY (4) will be at peak fitness now and may earn some minor money.
